title: Xtra Rich German Sausage Stew
description: A rich and silky German stew featuring marinated sausage, perfect for a high-protein meal or hangover cure. This hearty dish is made with tender sausage and vegetables in a flavorful broth.

ingredients.name: marinade
ingredients.notes: made with 1/2 cup beer and 1/2 cup apple cider vinegar

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the marinade ingredients and add the sliced sausage, letting it marinate for at least 30 minutes.
In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat and add the chopped onion, cooking until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, cooking for 5 minutes, until they begin to soften.
Add the marinated sausage, beef broth, and tomato paste, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Season the stew with black pepper and serve hot.
Garnish with fresh parsley or thyme, if desired.
Serve with crusty bread or over egg noodles.
Let the stew cool completely before refrigerating or freezing.
